title: Indulgent Rich Croatian Fish Carpaccio
description: A rich and indulgent Croatian dish featuring sashimi-cut fish, dried fruit, and a blend of fresh flavors, perfect for a special occasion dinner
instructions: Slice the sea bass fillets into thin sashimi-cut pieces and place them on a large plate or platter
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper to make the dressing
Drizzle the dressing over the fish pieces, making sure they are all coated
Sprinkle the chopped dried apricots and cranberries over the top of the fish
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately
Refrigerate the dish for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together
Just before serving, give the dish a gentle toss to redistribute the ingredients
Serve the carpaccio chilled, garnished with additional parsley if desired
